actionUnits.condition: Scoremanager (GUID f7de224e5fee443418417f9f2bfa2998) has no Rigidbody/Collider/EventTrigger and exposes only one public method changescore(int), which cannot be invoked via the no-parameter Trigger schema. Start() and Update() run automatically; no m_Calls are present for manual UnityEvent hookups. Prefab modifications set winAmount=4 and reference winlosescript fileID 1176795496. To cover the win path, we need a way to invoke changescore repeatedly until score==winAmount, or a no-arg proxy on either Scoremanager or WinLose.
